item.title: 马来西亚维持关键利率不变，警告中东战争加剧风险
item.description: 马来西亚维持基准利率不变，但警告称中东冲突加剧已导致下行风险上升。【原文：Malaysia kept its benchmark interest rate unchanged, but warned that downside risks have risen from the deepening conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 赤泽将访美，日本力求维持贸易协定完整
item.description: 日本经济产业大臣赤泽龙正将访问美国，此举旨在维护东京与华盛顿的贸易协议，并为本月日本首相高市早苗与美国总统特朗普的峰会造势。【原文：Japanese Trade Minister Ryosei Akazawa will visit the US as Tokyo seeks to preserve its trade deal with Washington and build momentum ahead of a summit this month between Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and US President Donald Trump.】

item.title: 本田将通过从美国、中国进口汽车来扩大日本产品阵容
item.description: 本田汽车公司将从美国和中国进口汽车在日本本土销售，这家日本汽车制造商正试图通过加强国内产品阵容来应对汽车业务不断加剧的亏损。【原文：Honda Motor Co. will import cars from the US and China to sell in its home market as the Japanese carmaker looks to beef up its domestic lineup in the face of mounting losses from its auto business.】

item.title: 第一兰德中期利润创纪录，贷款与手续费双双攀升
item.description: 南非第一兰德银行（FirstRand Ltd.）中期利润创历史新高，这家非洲市值最大的银行从手续费和佣金中获得更多收益，同时贷款增长推动了收入提升。【原文：FirstRand Ltd.’s interim profit rose to a record as Africa’s biggest bank by market value earned more from fees and commissions and as growth in loans boosted revenue.】

item.title: 欧洲股市将延续跌势，美元走强
软银集团信用违约互换升至近一年高位，因标普下调其展望评级
item.description: 软银集团的信用违约互换利差扩大至11个月高位，并持续保持日本企业中最高水平。该集团在人工智能领域的巨额投资对其信用状况构成压力。【原文：SoftBank Group Corp.’s credit default swaps widened to an 11-month high and remained the widest among Japanese corporates as its heavy investment in artificial intelligence weighs on its credit profile.】

item.title: 伊朗战争戳破了"卖美国、买亚洲"的热门策略
item.description: 伊朗战争正迫使投资者重新评估其最盈利的股票策略之一，部分人士据此认为"抛售美国资产、买入亚洲资产"的交易策略已达到转折点。【原文：The war in Iran is forcing investors to reevaluate one of their most profitable stock strategies, leading some to conclude that the “Sell America, Buy Asia” trade has reached an inflection point.】

item.title: 日本炼油企业要求政府动用战略储备
item.description: 知情人士透露，随着中东局势恶化，日本炼油企业正要求政府释放国家战略石油储备中的原油。【原文：Japanese oil refiners are asking the government to release crude from the nation’s strategic petroleum reserves as the Middle East crisis worsens, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 韩国LIG Nex1因获得海湾地区新防务订单的消息而股价飙升
item.description: 韩国国防承包商LIG Nex1公司股价大涨，因有报道称海湾国家可能扩大其导弹拦截器的订单，以抵御伊朗的袭击。【原文：Shares of South Korean defense contractor LIG Nex1 Co. jumped on reports that Gulf nations may expand orders for its missile interceptors to fend off Iranian strikes.】

item.title: 从经济繁荣到衰退，罗马尼亚面临新现实
item.description:
这个国家曾是该地区最具活力的国家之一。如今，它却面临着欧洲最糟糕的经济指标。【原文：

The country used to be one of the most dynamic in the region. Now it’s faced with some of the worst metrics in Europe.

】

item.title: 任天堂Switch 2用户面临存储困境，内存危机加剧
item.description: 任天堂公司盈利性游戏软件的需求正面临数据存储成本飙升的威胁，这给构建能够抵御关税和军事冲突影响的Switch 2生态系统蒙上阴影。【原文：Demand for Nintendo Co.’s profit-earning game software is under threat from soaring prices for data storage, clouding efforts to build a Switch 2 ecosystem that’s resilient to tariffs and military conflict.】

item.title: 英国央行拟制定人工智能冲击情景计划以应对失业担忧
item.description: 英国央行正计划模拟演练全面爆发的人工智能冲击可能带来的经济和金融影响，因担忧该技术将导致大量岗位流失并重创众多企业。【原文：The Bank of England is planning to war-game the potential economic and financial impact of a full-blown AI shock amid fears that the technology will cost vast numbers of jobs and cut through a swathe of businesses.】

item.title: 据称TPG正考虑出售或让亚洲一健康医疗上市
item.description: 知情人士透露，在私募股权资产交易活动日益活跃的背景下，TPG公司正考虑对亚洲一健康医疗有限公司采取多种处置方案，包括出售或首次公开募股。【原文：TPG Inc. is considering options for Asia OneHealthcare Sdn., including a sale or initial public offering, amid increasing deal activity for private equity-owned assets, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 据称日本央行将保留四月加息选项，同时密切关注伊朗危机
item.description: 知情人士称，日本央行官员仍计划加息，不排除4月加息的可能性，同时继续关注中东紧张局势对日本经济的影响。【原文：Bank of Japan officials are still on track to raise interest rates, with the possibility of April not ruled out, as they continue to monitor the implications of Middle East tensions for Japan’s economy, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 中国承诺在2026年结束通货紧缩，作出迄今最强有力的表态
item.description: 中国领导人作出迄今最强有力的承诺，誓要终结困扰世界第二大经济体的通货紧缩。这场持续三年的经济阴霾不断侵蚀企业利润，压低劳动者薪资水平。【原文：China’s leaders issued their strongest pledge yet to end deflation, a menace haunting the world’s No. 2 economy for three straight years by damaging business profits and holding down workers’ wages.】

item.title: 数据中心如何成为战争的牺牲品
item.description:
三处设施在无人机袭击中遭到破坏，分析人士称此类设施面临的风险日益加剧。

【原文：

Three facilities have suffered damage in drone strikes, and analysts say such installations are increasingly at risk.

】

item.title: 据Axios报道，特朗普团队促成委内瑞拉黄金出口交易
item.description: 据新闻网站Axios周三报道，特朗普政府与委内瑞拉国有矿业公司最终敲定协议，该南美国家将向美国市场出售多达1000公斤黄金。【原文：The Trump administration and Venezuela’s state mining company finalized a deal that would see the South American country selling as much as 1,000 kilograms of gold to US markets, the news website Axios reported on Wednesday.】

item.title: 亚洲液化天然气价格自三年高点回落，交易商权衡霍尔木兹海峡计划
item.description: 亚洲液化天然气价格从三年高位小幅回落，因市场正评估美国确保油轮安全通过霍尔木兹海峡计划的可行性。【原文：Asian liquefied natural gas prices pulled back slightly from the highest level in three years, as the market weighed the viability of an American plan to ensure safe passage for tankers through the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 新兴市场外汇波动率超越主要发达市场同行，此前曾创下历史最低水平
item.description: 新兴市场货币波动率本周首次突破发达市场水平，创下自5月以来新高，终结了此前创纪录的持续平稳期。【原文：Emerging-market currency volatility has surged above that of developed-market peers this week for the first time since May, breaking a stretch that was the longest on record.】

item.title: 市场已明确伊朗战争的赢家——美国
item.description:
主要得益于冲突爆发前的战略布局，美国正收获丰厚回报。

【原文：

Owing largely to positioning before the conflict erupted, the US is reaping the gains.

】

item.title: 俄罗斯石油货运重返印度，伊朗战争冲击供应链
item.description: 船舶追踪数据显示，两批原定运往东亚的俄罗斯原油货运目的地已改为印度。随着中东局势持续恶化，这表明新德里方面正更积极地接纳这些原油。【原文：Two Russian oil cargoes that had been signaling East Asia as a destination have switched to India, according to ship-tracking data, suggesting New Delhi is becoming more willing to take the crude as the Middle East conflict worsens.】

item.title: 日本投资者上月抛售海外债券规模创2024年以来新高
item.description: 日本投资者上月抛售了自2024年以来规模最大的海外债券，市场观察人士正密切关注资金流动动向，以判断国内收益率上升是否正引发资金回流。【原文：Japanese investors sold the largest amount of overseas bonds since 2024 last month, as market watchers scrutinize flows for signs that higher domestic yields were triggering repatriation.】

item.title: 美军将人工智能作为加速伊朗行动的关键工具
item.description: 据美国中央司令部称，美军正借助一系列人工智能工具快速处理针对伊朗行动的海量数据，凸显这项新兴技术在战争中的日益重要作用。【原文：US military forces are turning to a range of artificial intelligence tools to quickly manage enormous amounts of data for operations against Iran, according to US Central Command, highlighting the emerging technology’s growing role in warfare.】

item.title: 泰国通胀放缓或可缓解油价上涨带来的冲击
item.description: 泰国近一年来持续走低的消费价格，如今或可为抵御潜在的能源驱动型通胀飙升提供缓冲。【原文：Thailand’s nearly yearlong stretch of falling consumer prices may now provide a buffer against potential energy-driven inflation spike.】

item.title: 印度卢比在亚洲涨幅最大，因印度央行支持本币汇率
item.description: 印度卢比周四在亚洲市场涨幅居前，此前该国央行出手干预以支撑本币汇率，因卢比在前一交易日跌至历史最低点。【原文：India’s rupee advanced the most in Asia on Thursday as the central bank stepped in to shore up the currency after it weakened to a record low in the previous session.】

item.title: 中国在钢铁、炼油产能方面取得成效不一后，将目标转向这些领域
item.description: 中国钢铁和炼油行业的产能过剩问题再次成为政府关注的焦点。【原文：Chinese overcapacity in steelmaking and oil refining is once again in the government’s crosshairs.】

item.title: 日本30年期国债发售需求强劲 尽管伊朗战争阴云笼罩
item.description: 日本周四发行的30年期政府债券拍卖需求强劲，凸显出投资者需求依然旺盛，尽管中东局势紧张令宏观前景蒙上阴影。【原文：Japan’s 30-year government bond auction Thursday drew solid demand, underscoring resilient investor appetite even as tensions in the Middle East cloud the macro outlook.】

item.title: 国际货币基金组织称中东战争将考验世界经济，预计将出现新的冲击
item.description: 国际货币基金组织总裁克里斯塔利娜·格奥尔基耶娃表示，中东战争将考验全球经济的韧性，并警告称"各种形式和规模的新冲击"将持续出现。【原文：International Monetary Fund Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva said the war in the Middle East will test global economic resilience and warned that “new shocks in different shapes and sizes” will keep coming.】

item.title: 中国要求大型炼油企业停止柴油和汽油出口
item.description: 中国政府已要求国内最大炼油企业暂停柴油和汽油出口，因波斯湾地区冲突升级导致全球最大产油区之一的原油供应中断。【原文：China’s government has told the country’s largest oil refiners to suspend exports of diesel and gasoline as an escalating conflict in the Persian Gulf disrupts the arrival of crude from one of the world’s largest producing regions.】

item.title: Pop Mart股价上涨，中国表态支持知识产权消费
item.description: 中国玩具零售商股价周四在香港上涨，包括乐布布制造商泡泡玛特国际集团有限公司在内。此前中国最高经济规划机构在一份重要政策报告中表示支持该行业。【原文：Shares of Chinese toy retailers including Labubu maker Pop Mart International Group Ltd. rose Thursday in Hong Kong after China’s top economic planner signaled support for the sector in a key policy report.】
